basicDetails.implementingAgency: National Institute Of Agricultural Extension Management (MANAGE)

nodalMinistryName.label: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

nodalDepartmentName.label: Department of Agriculture Research and Education

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: "MANAGE Internship Programme" implemented by the National Institute of Agricultural Extension Management under the Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare, is open to students from the disciplines of Extension Education, Economics, Sociology, Psychology, MSW, Journalism, Communication, and Environmental Science. The internships are open year-round, and the duration ranges from 3 months to 6 months. The interns are provided a stipend of upto ₹ 35,000/- per month. The applicants should be fluent in English and should have good writing skills. The internships are open year-round.
schemeContent.benefits_md: > **Stipend:** - **For 3 months Internship Programme:** ₹ 10,000/- per month with free boarding and lodging.- **For 6 months Internship Programme:** ₹ 35,000/- per month. > **Duration:** - The internships are available for a duration of 3 months to 6 months.
schemeContent.briefDescription: MANAGE Internship Programme is open to students from the disciplines of Extension Education, Economics, Sociology, Psychology, MSW, Journalism, Communication, and Environmental Science. The internships are open year-round, and the duration ranges from 3 months upto 6 months.

children.text: "MANAGE Internship Programme" implemented by the National Institute of Agricultural Extension Management under the Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare, is open to students from the disciplines of Extension Education, Economics, Sociology, Psychology, MSW, Journalism, Communication, and Environmental Science. The internships are open year-round, and the duration ranges from 3 months to 6 months. The interns are provided a stipend of upto ₹ 35,000/- per month. The applicants should be fluent in English and should have good writing skills. The internships are open year-round.
₹ 10,000/- per month with free boarding and lodging.
The internships are available for a duration of 3 months to 6 months.

applicationProcess.process_md: > **Application through Official Website:** **Step 1:** Eligible candidates should visit the official [online application](https://www.manage.gov.in/internship/internship-save.asp) page. **Step 2:** Fill in all the mandatory details. **Step 3:** Upload the relevant documents. **Step 4:** Verify the details and then click on the "Submit" button. > **Application through E-mail:** - Interested candidates can email his/her CV along with the required documents (self-attested) to: **saravananraj.manage@gmail.com** (Dr. Saravanan Raj, Director, Agricultural Extension, MANAGE)

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: - The applicant should have completed/ongoing PhD or M.Sc in Extension Education/ Economics/ Sociology/ Psychology/ MSW/ Journalism/ Communication/ Environmental Science. - The applicant should have secured an OGPA of a minimum of 8 out of 10 (minimum 80%). - The applicant should have fluency in English. - The applicant should have good writing skills.

children.text: The applicant should have completed/ongoing PhD or M.Sc in Extension Education/ Economics/ Sociology/ Psychology/ MSW/ Journalism/ Communication/ Environmental Science.
The applicant should have secured an OGPA of a minimum of 8 out of 10 (minimum 80%).
The applicant should have fluency in English.
The applicant should have good writing skills.
